title: Enterprise Operations Platform (Durbin ERP)
description: Platform-scale enterprise solution for **Fleet Telematics** and **Mining Safety IoT** — built from scratch with real-time dashboards, geospatial tracking, and complex analytics.
bullets: Designed and built **CRM, CMS, and operational modules** with **real-time analytics dashboards** and dynamic charts for fleet and mining workflows
Integrated **Microsoft SSO** and **Odoo** enabling unified enterprise operations across teams
Architected a **custom UI component library** using Shadcn — reduced **npm size by 90%** (10GB → 500MB) and cut **UI defects by 60%**
Designed a **Feature-First / Domain-First frontend architecture** reducing **git merge conflicts by 60%** and **project setup time by 80%**

title: EEPC India
description: **Completely redesigned and migrated** the platform from **PHP to MERN**, delivering massive performance gains and a modern, scalable architecture.
bullets: Migrated the platform from **PHP to MERN stack** — improved **Speed Index by 93.33%** (9s → 0.6s) and **page load time by 97%**
Implemented **React Query** reducing redundant API calls by **85%** with smart caching and prefetching
Built **secure role-based access control** with JWT and HTTP-only cookies for multi-tier user management

title: NEMO — Voice Controlled AI Assistant
description: **Voice controlled personal virtual assistant** driven by AI/ML — responds to natural language commands, executes tasks, and engages users in a **human-like manner**. Recognised at SIH 2023.
bullets: Built a **voice-first AI assistant** using Python, speech recognition, OpenAI, and NLTK for natural language understanding
Implemented **intelligent query resolver**, browser control, open/close apps, search and play media, **send email and WhatsApp messages**
Added **task and appointment scheduling**, navigation & directions, **weather forecasting**, and contact/email management
**Ranked 7th among 74 teams** at Smart India Hackathon 2023 — also exhibited at **WBSCST Intellectual Property Rights Exhibition**

title: VidTube — Video Streaming App
description: **Responsive video streaming application** using the YouTube v3 API with category filtering, channel search, and seamless media playback.
bullets: Built a **responsive video streaming app** consuming the **YouTube v3 API** via RapidAPI
Implemented **video and channel search**, **category-based filtering**, and **personalized recommendations**
Integrated **React Player** for smooth in-app media playback without redirecting to YouTube

title: Movie Recommendation System
description: **Content-based movie recommendation engine** using cosine similarity across **7,500+ movies** including **2,850 Indian regional films**, with intelligent tag generation and vectorized similarity computation.
bullets: Built a **content-based recommendation system** using cosine similarity on a dataset of **7,500+ movies** including **2,850 Indian regional films**
Generated movie tags by combining **genre, title, top cast, director, keywords, and overview** — stemmed and vectorized into a similarity matrix using Scikit-learn
Recommends the **top 15 most similar movies** for any queried title with sub-second response

title: SMS / Email Spam Classifier
description: **NLP-powered spam detection system** classifying SMS and email messages using **multiple ML algorithms** with thorough preprocessing, EDA visualizations, and comparative model evaluation.
bullets: Developed a **multi-algorithm spam classifier** testing Naive Bayes, SVM, KNN, Decision Tree, Random Forest, AdaBoost, Bagging, Extra Trees, Gradient Boosting, and **XGBoost**
Conducted thorough **NLP preprocessing**: lowercasing, tokenization, stop-word removal, punctuation stripping, and stemming
Performed **EDA** with word clouds and histograms; evaluated models with **accuracy, precision, and confusion matrices**
